description:
Check how many rounds are left in the currently loaded magazine in the given muzzle.
{{Feature|informative|In older titles and before {{arma3}} v1.56, the command did not return ammo for units in vehicles.}}
examples: <sqf>_count = player ammo "M16"; // returns 30 in case of a full magazine</sqf>
name: ammo

Item.desc: weapon's muzzle - see the [[:Category:Weapons|Weapons]] topic for reference about possible values
Item.name: muzzle
